title: Hyperliquid Liquid Staking with @kinetiq_xyz
summary_title: How Hyperliquid survived a coordinated exchange attack, and what's next
summary_description: Omnia from Kinetic breaks down yesterday's HLP manipulation attempt, validator coordination, and why decentralized perpetuals terrify centralized exchanges.

key_moments.label: The HLP situation from yesterday clears, community bullish again
Omnia explains: coordination between OKEx, Binance, BitGet to trigger HLP bank run
Validators reached quorum to delist the manipulated asset nanoseconds after Binance listing
Someone accumulated almost one-fifth of jelly supply in four days pre-attack
Decentralization spectrum debate: Hyperliquid versus CEX versus Bitcoin
Builder codes on Hyperliquid threaten exchange business model more than perps alone
Kinetic liquid staking launch: why, how, and native integration strategy
StakeHub: autonomous validator scoring to eliminate kickback deals

pull_quote: If you were able to trick hyperliquids HLP into a position it shouldn't have been in the first place, you could trigger a liquidation, bank run, and endless FUD to put a huge end to your competition.
